target.name: BBC Weather London
target.extraction_prompt: Extract today's weather for London, including current conditions, high/low temperature, and any notable alerts. Read the actual visible page content before answering.

content:
BBC Weather London Morning Briefing

Current Conditions:
Tonight will be mild with a clear sky and gentle breeze. A clear sky and a gentle breeze.

Tonight's Forecast:
Low: 15°C
Conditions: Clear sky

Day-by-Day Forecast:
Friday 22nd May (Tonight): Low 15°C - Clear sky and gentle breeze

Saturday 23rd May:
High: 29°C, Low: 14°C - Sunny Intervals

Sunday 24th May:
High: 31°C, Low: 16°C - Sunny

Monday 25th May:
High: 32°C, Low: 18°C - Sunny

Tuesday 26th May:
High: 32°C, Low: 14°C - Sunny

Wednesday 27th May:
High: 24°C, Low: 12°C - Sunny

Thursday 28th May:
High: 26°C, Low: 14°C - Sunny Intervals

Friday 29th May:
High: 27°C, Low: 15°C - Sunny

Saturday 30th May:
High: 23°C, Low: 14°C - Light Rain

Sunday 31st May:
High: 23°C, Low: 12°C - Sunny Intervals

Environmental Summary:
Pollen: High
UV Index: Moderate
Pollution: Low

Sunrise: 05:00
Sunset: 20:55

Last updated: today at 21:02
